title: Hibernal Herbs
description: Hibernal Herbs celebrates the holidays with a little bit of mystic arts! Collect herbs and other ingredients to make the perfect holiday feast!
body:
[![mmc-reviews](https://github.com/intergrav/devins-badges/blob/v3/assets/cozy-minimal/available/mmcreviews_64h.png?raw=true)](https://mmcreviews.com/all/mods/hibernal-herbs/) [![curseforge](https://github.com/intergrav/devins-badges/blob/v3/assets/cozy-minimal/available/curseforge_64h.png?raw=true)]([https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/hibernal-herbs](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/garnished)) [![github](https://github.com/intergrav/devins-badges/blob/v3/assets/cozy-minimal/available/github_64h.png?raw=true)](https://github.com/DakotaPride/hibernal-herbs) [![discord](https://github.com/intergrav/devins-badges/blob/v3/assets/cozy-minimal/social/discord-plural_64h.png?raw=true)](https://discord.gg/8NkWwu9hgN) [![kinetic_hosting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/57e54853825c80a1ccf03302564e00b3483d7e57.png)](https://www.kinetichosting.net)
[![blanketcon '25](https://github.com/worldwidepixel/badges/blob/main/bc25/featured_in/cozy.svg?raw=true)](https://modfest.net/vanity/bc25)
Walking through snowy biomes, you'll come across mysterious herbs and Myqueste Trees! These are essential to getting started in Hibernal Herbs.


From drying herbs and conjuring new metals, the Mystical Campfire is a key component in progressing through the mod! The Incense Provider will give you and surrounding entities status effects depending on what pounded or dried herbs you provide to it.


You will also need to explore the End Highlands in order to reach the Arcane Ruins, which hold key items that you'll more than likely want to grab for unlocking your true potential in this mod.


### **Available Versions** **Minecraft 1.21/1.21.1 - Fabric/Neoforge - Supported, v1.4 and up** **Minecraft 1.20/1.20.1 - Fabric/Forge - up to v1.3.x** **Minecraft 1.19/1.19.1/1.19.2 - Fabric/Forge - up to v1.0.x** ### **Dependencies in 1.21+** **Requires [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) on Fabric** **Requires [Patchouli](https://modrinth.com/mod/patchouli) on both Fabric and Neoforge** **Requires [Accessories](https://www.modrinth.com/mod/accessories) on both Fabric and Neoforge** **Requires [EMI](https://modrinth.com/mod/emi) on both Fabric and Neoforge** **(Optional) Compatibility with [Catalogue](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/catalogue)**
